spec_match.rationale: Stellar presentation of await scrollTo sequencing, ensuring each stop resolves before progress indicator moves.

interactive.rationale: Excellent. Has start, reset, interactive step badges, a progress dot row, dynamic log, and active insight summaries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully matches the parent guided 5-stop listing.

edge_cases.rationale: Features custom smooth scroll animation fallbacks for older clients.

references.rationale: Violates the hard rule from AGENTS.md: lacks a canonical chromestatus.com reference link on the concept page.

design_system.rationale: Sleek tour console using neat border wraps, a visual progress dot container, and mono fonts.

openQuestions.title: Missing ChromeStatus Link
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical ChromeStatus link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082138340491264) to the see also or references list to comply with AGENTS.md hard rules.
